title: FX Small Items
description: This Pack Make Your Items Small And Give You Better PvP And FPS.
body:
![Before vs After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d877a27ff62f55bbf8fbdda2b5314463b2e94cb1.gif)# FX Small Items

FX Small Items is a clean PvP resource pack that makes held items smaller to improve screen visibility and gameplay comfort.

## Features
- Smaller first-person items
- Better PvP visibility
- Cleaner screen view
- Simple and lightweight
- FPS friendly style
- Small totem pop animation

## Version
- Minecraft Java Edition 1.21+

## Recommended For
- PvP
- Survival
- Bedwars
- Crystal PvP

Made by VanshFX
